bits.name: rev_id
bits.comment: revision id

bits.name: func_id
bits.comment: function id

bits.name: aud_proc_enable
bits.comment: enable aud_proc

bits.name: aud_proc_adc_path_reset
bits.comment: reset aud_proc adc path

bits.name: aud_proc_dac_path_reset
bits.comment: reset aud_proc dac path

bits.name: loopback_mode
bits.comment: aud_proc loopback test mode, from rx path to tx path

bits.name: high_speed_mode
bits.comment: aud_proc high speed mode enable

bits.name: sine_tone_en
bits.comment: 1:select sine tone output

bits.name: auto_clock_gating_en
bits.comment: enable auto clock gating to save power

bits.name: rx2tx_loop_en
bits.comment: 1:enable rx to tx path, rx path sample rate must be same as tx path when this bit is enable

bits.name: tx_lr_fifo_share_en
bits.comment: 1: tx L/R share one buffer. 0: tx L/R two buffer

bits.name: rx_lr_fifo_share_en
bits.comment: 1: rx L/R share one buffer. 0: rx L/R two buffer

bits.name: rxtx_lr_fifo_share_en
bits.comment: 1: rxtx L/R share one buffer. 0: rxtx L/R two buffer

bits.name: txrx_lr_fifo_share_en
bits.comment: 1:txrx channel L/R share mode. 0: txrx channel

bits.name: txrx_burst_mode
bits.comment: 1: txrx channel burst incr 4 mode, 0: txrx channel single mode

bits.name: rxtx_burst_mode
bits.comment: 1: rxtx channel burst incr 4 mode, 0: rxtx channel single mode

bits.name: tx_burst_mode
bits.comment: 1: tx channel burst incr 4 mode, 0: tx channel single mode

bits.name: rx_burst_mode
bits.comment: 1: rx channel burst incr 4 mode, 0: rx channel single mode

bits.name: tx_en_ch_0
bits.comment: channel enable

bits.name: tx_fifo_flush_ch_0
bits.comment: flush fifo 1'b1: flush status 1'b0: normal status

bits.name: tx_mode_ch_01
bits.comment: channel 0and1 bit mode 2'b00: 16-bit mode 2'b01: 24-bit mode 2'b1x: 32-bit mode

bits.name: tx_fifo_stat_ch_0
bits.comment: fifo_stat 2'b00: empty~quarter 2'b01: quarter~half 2'b10: half~full 2'b11: full

bits.name: tx_en_ch_1
bits.comment: channel enable

bits.name: tx_fifo_flush_ch_1
bits.comment: flush fifo 1'b1: flush status 1'b0: normal status

bits.name: tx_fifo_stat_ch_1
bits.comment: fifo_stat 2'b00: empty~quarter 2'b01: quarter~half 2'b10: half~full 2'b11: full

bits.name: tx_en_ch_2
bits.comment: channel enable

bits.name: tx_fifo_flush_ch_2
bits.comment: flush fifo 1'b1: flush status 1'b0: normal status

bits.name: tx_mode_ch_23
bits.comment: channel 2and3 bit mode 2'b00: 16-bit mode 2'b01: 24-bit mode 2'b1x: 32-bit mode

bits.name: tx_fifo_stat_ch_2
bits.comment: fifo_stat 2'b00: empty~quarter 2'b01: quarter~half 2'b10: half~full 2'b11: full

bits.name: tx_en_ch_3
bits.comment: channel enable

bits.name: tx_fifo_flush_ch_3
bits.comment: flush fifo 1'b1: flush status 1'b0: normal status

bits.name: tx_fifo_stat_ch_3
bits.comment: fifo_stat 2'b00: empty~quarter 2'b01: quarter~half 2'b10: half~full 2'b11: full

bits.name: rx_en_ch_0
bits.comment: channel enable

bits.name: rx_fifo_flush_ch_01
bits.comment: flush fifo 1'b1: flush status 1'b0: normal status

bits.name: rx_mode_ch_01
bits.comment: channel mode 1'b0: 16-bit mode 1'b1: 24-bit mode

bits.name: rx_fifo_stat_ch_01
bits.comment: fifo_stat 2'b00: empty~quarter 2'b01: quarter~half 2'b10: half~full 2'b11: full

bits.name: rx_en_ch_1
bits.comment: channel enable

bits.name: rx_en_ch_2
bits.comment: channel enable

bits.name: rx_fifo_flush_ch_23
bits.comment: flush fifo 1'b1: flush status 1'b0: normal status

bits.name: rx_mode_ch_23
bits.comment: channel mode 1'b0: 16-bit mode 1'b1: 24-bit mode

bits.name: rx_fifo_stat_ch_23
bits.comment: fifo_stat 2'b00: empty~quarter 2'b01: quarter~half 2'b10: half~full 2'b11: full

bits.name: rx_en_ch_3
bits.comment: channel enable

bits.name: src_in_sel
bits.comment: 0:select tx0andtx1 into src 1:select rx2tx loop data into src

bits.name: src_mode
src_freq_sel
bits.comment: 0: output 48k mode 1: output 26m/512 mode

bits.name: src_ch_en
bits.comment: [0]: l channel enable [1]: r channel enable

bits.name: rx_mux_mode_l
bits.comment: dac mux left channel add rx mux mode 2'b00: add rx ch0 data 2'b01: add rx ch1 data other: disable rx mux

bits.name: tx_mux_mode_l
bits.comment: dac mux left channel add tx mux mode 2'b00: add tx ch2 data 2'b01: add tx ch3 data other: disable tx23 mux

bits.name: rx_mux_mode_r
bits.comment: dac mux right channel add rx mux mode 2'b00: add rx ch0 data 2'b01: add rx ch1 data other: disable rx mux

bits.name: tx_mux_mode_r
bits.comment: dac mux right channel add tx mux mode 2'b00: add tx ch0 data 2'b01: add tx ch1 data other: disable tx01 mux

bits.name: dac_volume_l
bits.comment: dac left channel volume

bits.name: dac_volume_r
bits.comment: dac right channel volume

bits.name: dac_mixer_mode_l
bits.comment: dac left channel mixer mode 3'h0:left channel data 3'h1:mute 3'h2:right channel data 3'h3:(left channel + right channel)/2 3'h4:(left channel - right channel)/2 other: left channel data

bits.name: dac_mixer_mode_r
bits.comment: dac right channel mixer mode 3'h0:left channel data 3'h1:mute 3'h2:right channel data 3'h3:(left channel + right channel)/2 3'h4:(left channel - right channel)/2 other: right channel data

bits.name: eq_ch_en
bits.comment: EQ channel enable 2'b11: enable both channel 2'b10: enable right channel only 2'b01: enable left channel only 2'b00: Bypass EQ

bits.name: eq_stage
bits.comment: set eq number of stage

bits.name: eq_clr_done
bits.comment: EQ clear is done

bits.name: eq_clr
bits.comment: clear EQ module

bits.name: src_clr
bits.comment: clear src path

bits.name: src_flt_bypass
bits.comment: [0]: force half band filter 1 bypass [1]: force half band filter 2 bypass [2]:force upsample filter bypass [3]:force src filter bypass

bits.name: aud_proc_dac_trig_en
bits.comment: 1:enable dac trigger

bits.name: aud_proc_tx_i2s_trig_en
bits.comment: 1:enable i2s trigger

bits.name: adc01_volume_l
bits.comment: adc left channel volume

bits.name: adc01_volume_r
bits.comment: adc right channel volume

bits.name: adc23_volume_l
bits.comment: adc left channel volume

bits.name: adc23_volume_r
bits.comment: adc right channel volume

bits.name: side_tone_l_input_sel
bits.comment: 1:side_tone select right channel; 0:side_tone select left channel

bits.name: side_tone_r_input_sel
bits.comment: 1:side_tone select left channel; 0:side_tone select right channel

bits.name: side_tone_mixer_mode_l
bits.comment: dac left channel mixer mode 3'h0:left channel data 3'h1:mute 3'h2:right channel data 3'h3:(left channel + right channel)/2 3'h4:(left channel - right channel)/2 other: left channel data

bits.name: side_tone_mixer_mode_r
bits.comment: dac right channel mixer mode 3'h0:left channel data 3'h1:mute 3'h2:right channel data 3'h3:(left channel + right channel)/2 3'h4:(left channel - right channel)/2 other: right channel data

bits.name: side_tone_mode
bits.comment: side tone mode 1'h0: add side tone after eq 1'h1: add side tone before eq

bits.name: side_tone_en
bits.comment: side tone enable

bits.name: aud_proc_rx01_i2s_trig_en
bits.comment: 1:enable i2s trigger

bits.name: aud_proc_rx23_i2s_trig_en
bits.comment: 1:enable i2s trigger

bits.name: eq_adc_ch_en
bits.comment: EQ channel enable [1]: enable chanl1 adc EQ [0]: enable chanl0 adc EQ

bits.name: eq_adc_stage
bits.comment: set eq number of stage

bits.name: eq_adc_clr_done
bits.comment: EQ clear is done

bits.name: eq_adc_clr
bits.comment: clear EQ module

bits.name: adc1_source_sel
bits.comment: adc source select 1'h1: select Ext Interface 1'h0: select codec

bits.name: adc2_source_sel
bits.comment: adc source select 1'h1: select Ext Interface 1'h0: select codec

bits.name: adc_sync_mode
bits.comment: 1:adc01 and adc23 are sync; 0:adc01 and adc23 are async

bits.name: loop_volume
bits.comment: rx to tx loop path volume

bits.name: txrx_en_ch_0
bits.comment: channel enable

bits.name: txrx_fifo_flush_ch_0
bits.comment: flush fifo 1'b1: flush status 1'b0: normal status

bits.name: txrx_mode_ch_0
bits.comment: channel mode 1'b0: 16-bit mode 1'b1: 24-bit mode

bits.name: txrx_fifo_stat_ch_0
bits.comment: fifo_stat 2'b00: empty~quarter 2'b01: quarter~half 2'b10: half~full 2'b11: full

bits.name: txrx_fifo_full_sel_ch_0
bits.comment: 1:select almost full, thus can use af_th_ch_0 to control fifo level

bits.name: txrx_fifo_clr_ch_0
bits.comment: 1:clear txrx fifo

bits.name: txrx_en_ch_1
bits.comment: channel enable

bits.name: txrx_fifo_flush_ch_1
bits.comment: flush fifo 1'b1: flush status 1'b0: normal status

bits.name: txrx_mode_ch_1
bits.comment: channel mode 1'b0: 16-bit mode 1'b1: 24-bit mode

bits.name: txrx_fifo_stat_ch_1
bits.comment: fifo_stat 2'b00: empty~quarter 2'b01: quarter~half 2'b10: half~full 2'b11: full

bits.name: rxtx_en_ch_0
bits.comment: channel enable

bits.name: rxtx_fifo_flush_ch_0
bits.comment: flush fifo 1'b1: flush status 1'b0: normal status

bits.name: rxtx_mode_ch_0
bits.comment: channel mode 1'b0: 16-bit mode 1'b1: 24-bit mode

bits.name: rxtx_fifo_stat_ch_0
bits.comment: fifo_stat 2'b00: empty~quarter 2'b01: quarter~half 2'b10: half~full 2'b11: full

bits.name: rxtx_fifo_clr_ch_0
bits.comment: rxtx fifo clr

bits.name: rxtx_ch01_4mac_in_en
bits.comment: 1: enable 4 mac sync mode

bits.name: rxtx_en_ch_1
bits.comment: channel enable

bits.name: rxtx_fifo_flush_ch_1
bits.comment: flush fifo 1'b1: flush status 1'b0: normal status

bits.name: rxtx_mode_ch_1
bits.comment: channel mode 1'b0: 16-bit mode 1'b1: 24-bit mode

bits.name: rxtx_fifo_stat_ch_1
bits.comment: fifo_stat 2'b00: empty~quarter 2'b01: quarter~half 2'b10: half~full 2'b11: full

bits.name: rxtx_fifo_clr_ch_1
bits.comment: rxtx fifo clr

bits.name: frac_src_en
bits.comment: 1: fractional src enable

bits.name: frac_rate_adj_soft_en
bits.comment: 1:set software configure src rate

bits.name: frac_rate_soft_set
bits.comment: 1: directly set frac src value

bits.name: frac_rate_adj_sw
aud_dac_trig_cfg_update
bits.comment: 1:update trig configure, such as *hw_en,*_sw, trig_cnt_th

bits.name: aud_proc_dac_strb_lrck_sel
bits.comment: 0: select lrck0, 1: select lrck1

bits.name: dac_src_trig_cnt_th
bits.comment: hw trigger counter threshold,

bits.name: aud_dac_trig_sw_oe
bits.comment: 1:enable software to start aud oe

bits.name: aud_dac_trig_sw
bits.comment: 1:enable software to start aud

bits.name: aud_dac_trig_hw_en
bits.comment: 1:enable hw trigger to start aud

bits.name: dac_src_strb_lo_cnt_th
bits.comment: strb cnt low 24 bits threshold

bits.name: aud_proc_dac_stb_sel
bits.comment: 0: aud codec strb, 1: aud intf strb l, 2: aud intf strb r

bits.name: bt_clk_strb_inv
bits.comment: 1:sel invert strb edge to cnt

bits.name: dac_src_strb_cnt_en
bits.comment: 1:enable strb cnt

bits.name: swap_chlr_0
bits.comment: Swap Channel L and Channel R.[0] [0] for output channel swap, 0: left, 1:right [1] for input channel swap, 0: left, 1: right

bits.name: tx_data_half_cycle_dly_0
bits.comment: delayed Audio data out by half cycle. 0:: NO_DLY 1:: DLY

bits.name: lsb_0
bits.comment: When high, the output data format is with the least significant bit first. 0:: MSB 1:: LSB

bits.name: right_justified_0
bits.comment: right justified mode.

bits.name: bck_lrck_0
bits.comment: configure extend cycles of bck after data transfer is finished. Voice_Mode:: each sample takes wlen + tx_bck_lrck BCLK cycle. Audio_Mode:: each sample takes 2*(wlen + tx_bck_lrck) BCLK cycle. 2 times than Voice

bits.name: wlen_0
bits.comment: i2s data length 00: 16-bit 01: 20-bit 10: 24-bit 11: 32-bit

bits.name: lrck_pol_0
bits.comment:
configure LRCK polarity. 0:: LEFT_H_RIGHT_L: high level on LRCK means left channel, low level on LRCK means right channel. 1:: LEFT_L_RIGHT_H: high level on LRCK means right channel, low level on LRCK means left channel.
Note: this bit should be set to '0' (LEFT_H_RIGHT_L) in voice mode.

bits.name: bck_pol_0
bits.comment: if Master Mode, invert BCLK out. if slave Mode, invert BCLK in. 0:: NORMAL 1:: INVERT

bits.name: bckout_gate_0
bits.comment: Sets the BckOut gating. This bit decide if aud intf continue to output BCK clock after data has been sent. 0:: NO_GATE 1:: GATED

bits.name: rx_half_cycle_dly_0
bits.comment: delayed Audio input data by half cycle. 0:: NO_DLY 1:: DLY

bits.name: tx_lrck_half_cycle_dly_0
bits.comment: delayed Audio LRCK by half cycle. 0:: NO_DLY 1:: DLY

bits.name: rx_dly_0
bits.comment: Indicates the delay between serial data in MSB and LRCK edge. 2'b00:: ALIGN: Digital audio in MSB is aligned with LRCLK edge. 2'b01:: DLY_1: Digital audio in MSB is 1 cycle delayed to LRCLK edge. 2'b10:: DLY_2: Digital audio in MSB is 2 cycle delayed to LRCLK edge. 2'b11:: DLY_3: Digital audio in MSB is 3 cycle delayed to LRCLK edge.

bits.name: tx_dly_s_0
bits.comment: ONLY for slave mode:: configure 1 cycle supplementary Tx delay. 0:: NO_DLY: No supplementary Tx delay. 1:: DLY: One Cycle supplementary Tx delay.

bits.name: tx_dly_0
bits.comment: configure the delay between serial data out MSB and LRCK edge. 0:: ALIGN: Digital audio out MSB is aligned with LRCLK edge. 1:: DLY_1: Digital audio out MSB is 1 cycle delayed to LRCLK edge

bits.name: master_mode_0
bits.comment: configure aud intf works in master mode (LRCLK and BCK timing signals are generated internally) or slave mode (LRCLK and BCK timing signals are generated externally). 0:: SLAVE 1:: MASTER

bits.name: rx_serial_mode_0
bits.comment: Configure serial aud intf mode. 0:: I2S_PCM 1:: VOICE 2:: DAI When mode is set DAI, the bit Master Mode should be set to '1'. Data should be sent out on falling edge, which requires either Bclk_Pol = '0' and Half_Cycle_DLY = '1' or Bclk_Pol = '1' and Half_Cycle_DLY = '0'. Bits Tx_DLY and BCKOut_Gate must be configured to '0' and '1'. The DAI mode must NOT be modified after aud intf is enabled.

bits.name: tx_serial_mode_0
bits.comment: Configure serial aud intf mode. 0:: I2S_PCM 1:: VOICE 2:: DAI When mode is set DAI, the bit Master Mode should be set to '1'. Data should be sent out on falling edge, which requires either Bclk_Pol = '0' and Half_Cycle_DLY = '1' or Bclk_Pol = '1' and Half_Cycle_DLY = '0'. Bits Tx_DLY and BCKOut_Gate must be configured to '0' and '1'. The DAI mode must NOT be modified after aud intf is enabled.

bits.name: tx_off_0
bits.comment: Disable aud intf Tx functions. Important:: if you want to do record only, you must set this bit otherwise aud intf state machine will not start. 0:: TX_ON: Both Tx Rx enabled. 1:: TX_OFF: Rx enabled only, Tx disabled.

bits.name: tx_mode_0
bits.comment: Configure mono or stereo format for Audio data out: 2'b00:: STEREO_STEREO: stereo input from DMA, stereo output to pin. 2'b01:: MONOL_STEREO_DUPLI: mono channel L input from DMA, stereo output duplicate in both channels to pin. 2'b10:: MONOR_STEREO_DUPLI: mono channel R input from DMA, stereo output duplicate in both channels to pin. 2'b11:: MONO_IN_MONO_OUT Funtion mono input from DMA, stereo output in left channel to pin, can be implemented by setting aud intf_tx_cfg_ch[1] or aud intf_tx_cfg_ch[0] disable. When works in DAI, or DSD mode, always select "00" mode STEREO_STEREO.

bits.name: i2s_enable_0
bits.comment: enable i2s interface

bits.name: swap_chlr_1
bits.comment: Swap Channel L and Channel R.[0] [0] for output channel swap, 0: left, 1:right [1] for input channel swap, 0: left, 1: right

bits.name: tx_data_half_cycle_dly_1
bits.comment: delayed Audio data out by half cycle. 0:: NO_DLY 1:: DLY

bits.name: lsb_1
bits.comment: When high, the output data format is with the least significant bit first. 0:: MSB 1:: LSB

bits.name: right_justified_1
bits.comment: right justified mode.

bits.name: bck_lrck_1
bits.comment: configure extend cycles of bck after data transfer is finished. Voice_Mode:: each sample takes wlen + tx_bck_lrck BCLK cycle. Audio_Mode:: each sample takes 2*(wlen + tx_bck_lrck) BCLK cycle. 2 times than Voice

bits.name: wlen_1
bits.comment: i2s data length 00: 16-bit 01: 20-bit 10: 24-bit 11: 32-bit

bits.name: lrck_pol_1
bits.comment:
configure LRCK polarity. 0:: LEFT_H_RIGHT_L: high level on LRCK means left channel, low level on LRCK means right channel. 1:: LEFT_L_RIGHT_H: high level on LRCK means right channel, low level on LRCK means left channel.
Note: this bit should be set to '0' (LEFT_H_RIGHT_L) in voice mode.

bits.name: bck_pol_1
bits.comment: if Master Mode, invert BCLK out. if slave Mode, invert BCLK in. 0:: NORMAL 1:: INVERT

bits.name: bckout_gate_1
bits.comment: Sets the BckOut gating. This bit decide if aud intf continue to output BCK clock after data has been sent. 0:: NO_GATE 1:: GATED

bits.name: rx_half_cycle_dly_1
bits.comment: delayed Audio input data by half cycle. 0:: NO_DLY 1:: DLY

bits.name: tx_lrck_half_cycle_dly_1
bits.comment: delayed Audio output LRCK by half cycle. 0:: NO_DLY 1:: DLY

bits.name: rx_dly_1
bits.comment: Indicates the delay between serial data in MSB and LRCK edge. 2'b00:: ALIGN: Digital audio in MSB is aligned with LRCLK edge. 2'b01:: DLY_1: Digital audio in MSB is 1 cycle delayed to LRCLK edge. 2'b10:: DLY_2: Digital audio in MSB is 2 cycle delayed to LRCLK edge. 2'b11:: DLY_3: Digital audio in MSB is 3 cycle delayed to LRCLK edge.

bits.name: tx_dly_s_1
bits.comment: ONLY for slave mode:: configure 1 cycle supplementary Tx delay. 0:: NO_DLY: No supplementary Tx delay. 1:: DLY: One Cycle supplementary Tx delay.

bits.name: tx_dly_1
bits.comment: configure the delay between serial data out MSB and LRCK edge. 0:: ALIGN: Digital audio out MSB is aligned with LRCLK edge. 1:: DLY_1: Digital audio out MSB is 1 cycle delayed to LRCLK edge

bits.name: master_mode_1
bits.comment: configure aud intf works in master mode (LRCLK and BCK timing signals are generated internally) or slave mode (LRCLK and BCK timing signals are generated externally). 0:: SLAVE 1:: MASTER

bits.name: rx_serial_mode_1
bits.comment: Configure serial aud intf mode. 0:: I2S_PCM 1:: VOICE 2:: DAI When mode is set DAI, the bit Master Mode should be set to '1'. Data should be sent out on falling edge, which requires either Bclk_Pol = '0' and Half_Cycle_DLY = '1' or Bclk_Pol = '1' and Half_Cycle_DLY = '0'. Bits Tx_DLY and BCKOut_Gate must be configured to '0' and '1'. The DAI mode must NOT be modified after aud intf is enabled.

bits.name: tx_serial_mode_1
bits.comment: Configure serial aud intf mode. 0:: I2S_PCM 1:: VOICE 2:: DAI When mode is set DAI, the bit Master Mode should be set to '1'. Data should be sent out on falling edge, which requires either Bclk_Pol = '0' and Half_Cycle_DLY = '1' or Bclk_Pol = '1' and Half_Cycle_DLY = '0'. Bits Tx_DLY and BCKOut_Gate must be configured to '0' and '1'. The DAI mode must NOT be modified after aud intf is enabled.

bits.name: tx_off_1
bits.comment: Disable aud intf Tx functions. Important:: if you want to do record only, you must set this bit otherwise aud intf state machine will not start. 0:: TX_ON: Both Tx Rx enabled. 1:: TX_OFF: Rx enabled only, Tx disabled.

bits.name: tx_mode_1
bits.comment: Configure mono or stereo format for Audio data out: 2'b00:: STEREO_STEREO: stereo input from DMA, stereo output to pin. 2'b01:: MONOL_STEREO_DUPLI: mono channel L input from DMA, stereo output duplicate in both channels to pin. 2'b10:: MONOR_STEREO_DUPLI: mono channel R input from DMA, stereo output duplicate in both channels to pin. 2'b11:: MONO_IN_MONO_OUT Funtion mono input from DMA, stereo output in left channel to pin, can be implemented by setting aud intf_tx_cfg_ch[1] or aud intf_tx_cfg_ch[0] disable. When works in DAI, or DSD mode, always select "00" mode STEREO_STEREO.

bits.name: i2s_enable_1
bits.comment: enable i2s interface

bits.name: slotnum_0
bits.comment: slots number to be transferred in one frame

bits.name: longsync_0
bits.comment: longsync enable

bits.name: tx_bit_mode_0
bits.comment: 0: low bit are inserted zero to 24bits 1:high bits are inserted zero to 24bits

bits.name: rx_bit_mode_0
bits.comment: 0: low bit are inserted zero to 24bits 1:high bits are inserted zero to 24bits

bits.name: lrck_m_dly_0
bits.comment: 1: output lrck delay one bck

bits.name: tx_sync_mode_0
bits.comment: 1:output fast sync in master mode

bits.name: loop_back_0
bits.comment: Sets i2s in loop back mode. The feature is for debug only and can not work in DAI mode. 0:: NORMAL 1:: LOOPBACK

bits.name: bckout_auto_gate_bypass_0
bits.comment: 1: bypss bck auto gate, keep bck output always ok

bits.name: i2s_chn_out_sel
bits.comment: 1:i2s tx sel channel 1; 0:i2s tx sel channel 0

bits.name: i2s_chn_in_sel
bits.comment: 1:i2s rx sel channel 1; 0:i2s rx sel channel 0

bits.name: slotnum_1
bits.comment: slots number to be transferred in one frame

bits.name: longsync_1
bits.comment: longsync enable

bits.name: tx_bit_mode_1
bits.comment: 0: low bit are inserted zero to 24bits 1:high bits are inserted zero to 24bits

bits.name: rx_bit_mode_1
bits.comment: 0: low bit are inserted zero to 24bits 1:high bits are inserted zero to 24bits

bits.name: lrck_m_dly_1
bits.comment: 1: output lrck delay one bck

bits.name: tx_sync_mode_1
bits.comment: 1:output fast sync in master mode

bits.name: loop_back_1
bits.comment: Sets i2s in loop back mode. The feature is for debug only and can not work in DAI mode. 0:: NORMAL 1:: LOOPBACK

bits.name: bckout_auto_gate_bypass_1
bits.comment: 1: bypss bck auto gate, keep bck output always ok

bits.name: spdif_channel_stat_0
bits.comment: spdif channel status out

bits.name: channel_spdif_in
bits.comment: spdif input status2

bits.name: aud_src_enable
bits.comment: 1: aud src function enable

bits.name: aud_src_path_reset
bits.comment: 1: aud src path reset

bits.name: aud_src_txrx_lr_fifo_share_en
bits.comment: 1: enable txrx channel share one buffer

bits.name: aud_src_tx_lr_fifo_share_en
bits.comment: 1: enable tx channel data share one buffer

bits.name: aud_src_txrx_en_ch_1
bits.comment: 1: enable src txrx channel r.

bits.name: aud_src_txrx_en_ch_0
bits.comment: 1: enable src txrx channel l,

bits.name: aud_src_txrx_fifo_flush_ch
bits.comment: 1: flush txrx src buffer

bits.name: aud_src_txrx_mode_ch
bits.comment: 1: select src txrx data is 24 bits; 0; select src txrx data is 16 bits

bits.name: aud_src_tx_en_ch_1
bits.comment: 1: enable src tx channel r.

bits.name: aud_src_tx_en_ch_0
bits.comment: 1: enable src tx channel l,

bits.name: aud_src_tx_mode_ch
bits.comment: 1: select src tx data is 24 bits; 0; select src tx data is 16 bits

bits.name: aud_src_auto_clock_gating_en
bits.comment: 1: enable src audo clock gating

bits.name: aud_src_adc_in_en
bits.comment: 1: select src tx data from adc channel, 0: select src tx data from src tx channel

bits.name: aud_src_txrx_burst_mode
bits.comment: 1:src txrx channel burst inc4 mode; 0: src txrx channel single mode

bits.name: aud_src_tx_burst_mode
bits.comment: 1:src tx channel burst inc4 mode; 0: src tx channel single mode

bits.name: aud_src_frac_src_en
bits.comment: 1. enable aud rx src function mode

bits.name: aud_src_ch_en
bits.comment: [0]:1, enable aud src l channel [1]:1, enable aud src r channel

bits.name: aud_src_freq_sel
bits.comment: 0: output 48k mode 1: output 26m/512 mode

bits.name: aud_src_mode
aud_src_clr
bits.comment: 1: clear aud src data path

bits.name: aud_src_flt_bypass
bits.comment: [0]:1, bypass 1th src half band filter [1]:1, bypass 2th src half band filter [2]:1, bypass 3th src half band filter [3]:1, bypass src filter

bits.name: aud_src_decim24_sel
bits.comment: 1: select src decimation 2; 0: select src decimation 4;

bits.name: aud_src_decim24_bypass
bits.comment: 1:bypass src decimation 2/4

bits.name: aud_src_decim3_sel
bits.comment: 1:select src decimation 3

bits.name: aud_src_decim3_bypass
bits.comment: 1: bypass src decimation 3
